description: Run the Bologna Pasubio traffic simulation using the configuration at ~/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg. Analyze the resulting trip information to compute six aggregate metrics: total_trips (number of completed vehicle trips), avg_duration (average duration in seconds), avg_waitingTime (average waiting time in seconds), avg_timeLoss (average time loss in seconds), max_duration_vehicle (ID of the vehicle with the longest trip duration), and max_duration_value (the duration value of that longest trip). Round all numeric values to two decimal places. Save the results to ~/SUMO_Output/trip_report.txt with one metric per line in the format key=value.
